title: Sour Crispy Peruvian Kabanos Sausage Stir-fry
description: A vegan-friendly meal-prep dish featuring sour and crisp kabanos sausages prepared using sous-vide technology, served as a stir-fry.

ingredients.name: Kabanos Sausages
ingredients.notes: Use vegan kabanos sausages for a true Peruvian twist.

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Vegan soy sauce or tamari can be used.

ingredients.name: Shredded Cabbage
ingredients.notes: Use non-fermented, organic cabbage for best results.

ingredients.name: Red Onion
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely to match the texture of kabanos sausages.

ingredients.name: Fresh Lime Juice
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with fresh lemon juice for a similar taste but different flavor profile.

ingredients.name: Garlic Powder
ingredients.notes: For authentic Peruvian flavors and safety, make sure to use garlic powder.

ingredients.name: Cornstarch
ingredients.notes: For thickening the sauce and ensuring it sticks to kabanos sausages.

instructions: Preheat your sous-vide machine to 62°C (143°F) for a minimum of 8 hours.
Remove kabanos sausages from the bag and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix soy sauce, fresh lime juice, garlic powder, and cornstarch together. Set aside as the marinade.
Coat each kabanos sausage lightly with cornstarch mixture on both sides, making sure they are evenly coated.
Drizzle the remaining marinade over the sausages to coat them thoroughly.
Place the coated sausages back into the sous-vide bag and re-seal. Ensure no air is trapped inside.
Return the sous-vide machine to 62°C (143°F) for an additional hour to finish cooking the kabanos sausages.
While the sausages are being cooked, prepare the stir-fry: finely chop cabbage and red onion, set aside in a large bowl.
Add sesame seeds to the bowl of vegetables if desired for added crunch.

Heat a wok or frying pan with a bit of vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add kabanos sausages to the pan once they're out of the sous-vide bag and warm up, turning occasionally until golden brown on all sides (about 5-7 minutes).
Remove the sausages from the pan and set aside.

In the same pan used for stir-frying, add a bit more oil if needed. Once hot, toss in chopped red onion followed by shredded cabbage. Stir fry together until vegetables start to wilt (approximately 4-5 minutes), adding the cornstarch marinade from step 2 into the mix after about 3 minutes.

Once all vegetables are well-cooked and slightly tender but still holding their shape, return sausages to the pan. Toss everything together for a few more seconds until kabanos sausages are evenly coated with the sauce.
Serve hot over cooked rice or noodles as a flavorful lunch dish.
